title: Job Openings at StraitPay
content:
StraitPay - Spending and Investing in Africa should not require endless paperwork & brain numbing bureaucracy. We created straitPay to invite financial prosperity in all areas of Africa's economic growth.

We are recruiting to fill the following positions below:

1.) Junior Frontend Engineer

Job Location: Ikoyi, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Who We Are
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We firmly believe in the vast potential of the African continent.
	At straitPay, we are committed to unlocking this potential.
	straitPay was born from the vision of fostering financial prosperity and driving economic growth across Africa.
	At our core, we facilitate effortless money transfers from the diaspora to enable bill payments, airtime purchases, investments, and seamless interactions in local currencies. We invite you to be a part of this remarkable journey.


Who We’re Looking For


	We’re looking for a Frontend Engineer (React Native / React) who is early in their career but hungry to grow fast.
	You don’t need to know everything, but you must:
	
		Care about clean, usable products
		Be willing to learn quickly
		Take ownership of what you build
	
	
	You’ll work closely with Engineers, product managers and designers to bring our fintech products to life.


What You’ll Do


	Build and ship user-facing features across mobile (React Native) and web (React)
	Turn designs and wireframes into clean, functional UI
	Integrate frontend applications with backend APIs
	Fix bugs and improve performance across devices
	Contribute to improving code quality, structure and best practices
	Work with the team to ship features quickly and reliably
	Continuously learn and apply better frontend engineering practices


What Success Looks Like in This Role


	You ship features that work and improve over time
	You ask good questions and learn quickly
	You take feedback well and apply it
	You start owning small parts of the product end-to-end.


What You’ll Need (Core Requirements)


	1–3 years of experience in Frontend or Mobile Development
	Working knowledge of JavaScript (ES6+)
	Experience with React OR React Native
	Basic understanding of HTML, CSS and responsive design
	Familiarity with APIs (REST) and how the frontend connects to the Backend
	Experience using Git for version control
	Ability to debug issues and think through problems logically.


Nice to Have (Not Required):


	Experience with, or exposure to, Fintech and Financial services, Payments or related financial products
	Experience with TypeScript
	Understanding of performance optimization on mobile
	Familiarity with state management (e.g. Redux, Zustand, Context API)
	Experience shipping an app (personal, academic or professional).


Why Join straitPay


	Work on real fintech products used across Africa and the diaspora
	Be part of a fast-moving, high-impact team
	Learn quickly with strong exposure to Product and Engineering decisions
	Grow your career as the company scales
	Competitive salary and meaningful upside.


Click here to apply online

 

2.) Product/UI Designer (Contract)

Job Location: Ikoyi, Lagos
Employment Type: Contract

About the Role


	We're looking for someone who not only possesses a strong sense of teamwork but also has a keen eye for visual design, usability, and enhancing the user experience. Join us in shaping the future of fintech in Africa.


Responsibilities


	Create visually appealing and intuitive user interfaces that align with our brand guidelines.
	Working with Agile project teams and key stakeholders to develop and own the delivery of user-centered solutions.
	Develop storyboards, wireframes, mock-ups, and prototypes to effectively communicate and design ideas for strategic projects and product developments.
	Participating in user research and leveraging user analytics to gauge the usability of new and existing products/features, with the ability to analyze and predict user behavior.
	You’ll also use inputs from multiple sources to understand and empathize with customers and team members' needs, to create effective and innovative customer and user journeys.
	Participating in sprint and iteration planning, refinement, retrospectives, and iteration reviews.
	Collaborating with project stakeholders to help understand and define customer value.
	Design and test UI elements such as menus, CTAs, banners, page layouts, flows, and landing pages on web and mobile platforms.


Qualifications & Requirements


	Bachelor's Degree in Design, computer, or a related field (not mandatory).
	7 - 8 years of experience
	Fin-tech experience mandatory
	Experience in cross-border and remittance payments
	Relevant blockchain or crypto experience
	Experience in leading projects and managing design projects.
	Work closely with our Senior Product Manager in strategizing and designing user interfaces for new product developments.
	Strong storytelling and presentational skills; both verbal and written.
	Experience in working with Agile teams – with developers, designers, product managers, and testers.
	Knowledge of industry-standard methods – responsive design, material design, design system.
	Advanced usage of design tools such as Figma, Sketch, Photoshop, Illustrator, XD, and Miro.
	Passionate about research methods, user-centric design, and tracking data (i.e. Google Analytics).
	High attention to detail with a sharp eye for aesthetics.
	Innovative approach to solving UX and UI problems.
	Curious and eager to learn new methods.
	Able to manage a busy workload with minimal supervision.
	If you are passionate about creating exceptional user experiences and have a portfolio that demonstrates your design skills, we’d love to hear from you.


Why you should join us:


	Flexible work environment.
	A chance to do impactful work and make a difference on the continent.


Click here to apply online

 

 

3.) Senior Product Manager – Fintech & Banking

Job Location: Ikoyi, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

The Role


	We believe there is immense potential on the African continent. At straitPay, we believe in Africa. We are a fintech company on a mission to make spending and investing in Africa easier and more accessible for people living outside the continent.
	Our platform enables customers to send money, pay bills, buy airtime, invest, and interact with Africa seamlessly in their preferred local currencies.
	StraitPay was created to help unlock financial prosperity and support economic growth across Africa. Join us and be part of a team building the infrastructure that connects Africans around the world to the continent.
	We are looking for a Senior Product Manager – Fintech & Banking who is passionate about building financial products at scale.
	You will work in a fast-paced environment to design, build, and launch fintech products that power money movement, card payments, and core financial services on our platform.
	You will collaborate closely with engineering, compliance, operations, and leadership to deliver reliable, compliant, and scalable financial infrastructure.


Responsibilities


	Develop a deep understanding of customer needs and payment behaviours to identify product opportunities and improve the user experience.
	Define and drive the product strategy and roadmap for cards, wallets, and core financial infrastructure.
	Translate product strategy into clear product requirements and technical specifications for engineering teams.
	Work closely with engineering to build and launch products quickly while maintaining reliability and security.
	Lead the development and scaling of card products (debit, prepaid, and virtual cards).
	Manage integrations with card processors and payment schemes such as Visa and Mastercard.
	Define product requirements for core banking and ledger systems, including accounts, wallets, transactions, and settlement.
	Collaborate with compliance, risk, and operations teams to ensure products meet regulatory and fraud-prevention requirements.
	Drive product launches, working with leadership, marketing, and operations teams.
	Monitor product performance, gather customer feedback, and continuously improve the platform.
	Act as a product evangelist, building alignment across internal teams and external partners.


Requirements & Qualifications


	Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Business, or related field preferred but not required.
	5–8 years of Product Management experience, with 3+ years in fintech, banking, or payments.
	Proven experience owning financial products end-to-end, from concept and strategy through launch and scaling.
	Experience building or managing core banking or financial ledger systems, including accounts, wallets, transactions, reconciliation, and settlement.
	Hands-on experience developing card products (debit, prepaid, virtual) and managing the full card lifecycle.
	Experience integrating with card networks and processors, such as Visa, Mastercard, Marqeta, Galileo Financial Technologies, or Stripe.
	Strong understanding of payments infrastructure, including authorisation flows, clearing, settlement, and payment APIs.
	Experience working in regulated financial environments, collaborating with compliance teams on KYC/KYB, AML, and fraud controls.
	Strong technical understanding of APIs, backend systems, and microservices architectures.
	Sourcing and engaging with 3rd party providers.
	Excellent problem-solving, analytical, and stakeholder management skills.
	Ability to work effectively in a fast-paced startup environment.


Why Join Us


	Competitive salary and benefits
	Flexible work environment
	Opportunity to build an impactful financial infrastructure for Africa
	Mission-driven company empowering Africans worldwide
	Join us and play a key role in building a trusted and compliant financial ecosystem connecting the African diaspora to the continent.


Click here to apply online    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "description": "Amani Advisory Limited - Our client, a Fashion firm, is&nbsp;recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Personal Assistant / Content Creator

Job Location:&nbsp;Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are looking for a smart, stylish, and creative individual to join our fashion brand as a Personal Assistant / Content Creator.
	The ideal candidate will support the Creative Director with daily tasks while creating engaging fashion content that reflects the brand&rsquo;s identity and attracts customers.


Key Responsibilities
Personal Assistant Duties:


	Provide administrative and personal support to the Creative Director
	Manage schedules, appointments, calendars, and reminders efficiently
	Coordinate meetings, fittings, and production timelines
	Run personal and official errands for the Creative Director
	Assist in planning and organizing events, photoshoots, and brand activities
	Handle correspondence (emails, calls, and messages) on behalf of the Creative Director when required
	Maintain proper documentation and records of tasks, schedules, and activities
	Liaise with vendors, clients, and internal team members to ensure smooth operations
	Ensure the Creative Director is well-prepared for daily activities, meetings, and events.


Content Creation &amp; Social Media:


	Create high-quality and engaging fashion content (photos, videos, reels, behind-the-scenes, styling content)
	Develop and execute content ideas aligned with the brand&rsquo;s identity and goals
	Manage and post content consistently across all social media platforms
	Respond promptly to comments, messages, and customer inquiries on all platforms
	Monitor engagement, trends, and performance metrics to improve content strategy
	Maintain a consistent and visually appealing brand aesthetic
	Assist with styling, set preparation, and coordination during photoshoots and content creation sessions
	Capture real-time content during fittings, production, and daily brand activities
	Collaborate with the team to plan campaigns, product launches, and promotions
	Stay updated with current fashion trends, social media trends, and competitor activities.


Requirements


	2-3 years of experience in a similar role (fashion industry is an added advantage)
	Strong sense of style and understanding of fashion trends
	Proficiency in content creation (Instagram, TikTok, etc.)
	Good communication and interpersonal skills
	Highly organized, proactive, and able to multitask
	Ability to work in a fast-paced fashion environment
	Must be comfortable running errands for the Creative Director
	Basic knowledge of content editing apps/tools is a plus.


Salary
N200,000 - N250,000 monthly.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CVs to:&nbsp;talent@amaniadvisory.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Personal Assistant / Content Creator Job at Amani Advisory Limited




        
    

        
        Amani Advisory Limited - Our client, a Fashion firm, is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Personal Assistant / Content Creator

Job Location: Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are looking for a smart, stylish, and creative individual to join our fashion brand as a Personal Assistant / Content Creator.
	The ideal candidate will support the Creative Director with daily tasks while creating engaging fashion content that reflects the brand’s identity and attracts customers.


Key Responsibilities
Personal Assistant Duties:
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Provide administrative and personal support to the Creative Director
	Manage schedules, appointments, calendars, and reminders efficiently
	Coordinate meetings, fittings, and production timelines
	Run personal and official errands for the Creative Director
	Assist in planning and organizing events, photoshoots, and brand activities
	Handle correspondence (emails, calls, and messages) on behalf of the Creative Director when required
	Maintain proper documentation and records of tasks, schedules, and activities
	Liaise with vendors, clients, and internal team members to ensure smooth operations
	Ensure the Creative Director is well-prepared for daily activities, meetings, and events.


Content Creation & Social Media:


	Create high-quality and engaging fashion content (photos, videos, reels, behind-the-scenes, styling content)
	Develop and execute content ideas aligned with the brand’s identity and goals
	Manage and post content consistently across all social media platforms
	Respond promptly to comments, messages, and customer inquiries on all platforms
	Monitor engagement, trends, and performance metrics to improve content strategy
	Maintain a consistent and visually appealing brand aesthetic
	Assist with styling, set preparation, and coordination during photoshoots and content creation sessions
	Capture real-time content during fittings, production, and daily brand activities
	Collaborate with the team to plan campaigns, product launches, and promotions
	Stay updated with current fashion trends, social media trends, and competitor activities.


Requirements


	2-3 years of experience in a similar role (fashion industry is an added advantage)
	Strong sense of style and understanding of fashion trends
	Proficiency in content creation (Instagram, TikTok, etc.)
	Good communication and interpersonal skills
	Highly organized, proactive, and able to multitask
	Ability to work in a fast-paced fashion environment
	Must be comfortable running errands for the Creative Director
	Basic knowledge of content editing apps/tools is a plus.


Salary
N200,000 - N250,000 monthly.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CVs to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.
